name: Evergreen
description_short: Wisconsin-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with emphasis on eco-friendly financial products and member service.
description_long:
Evergreen Credit Union is a full-service financial institution headquartered in Neenah, Wisconsin, with a second location in Appleton. Founded to serve members in Winnebago, Outagamie, Calumet, Waupaca, and Waushara counties, the credit union welcomes anyone who lives, works, or attends college in those areas, plus those with family connections to the region. The institution operates as a traditional member-owned cooperative with an annual membership meeting and elected board governance.

Evergreen provides comprehensive banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and retirement accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they offer auto loans, home loans, home equity loans, personal loans, student loans, and specialized eco-friendly loan products including solar loans at 6.99% APR. They issue their own credit cards and provide online and mobile banking platforms, ATM access through their network, financial counseling, fraud/identity theft support, and debt protection services.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its "Earth-Kind Banking" initiative, positioning sustainability as a core brand value. Their eco-friendly loan products (solar and general eco-loans) appeal to environmentally conscious members. They actively engage members through community events, charitable donation programs, and seasonal promotions like the Lucky Debit Card Rewards program. The physical accessibility of two branch locations with extended drive-thru hours (M-F 7:30am-5:30pm) provides convenient service options.

As a credit union, Evergreen offers member-owned governance and typically competitive rates compared to traditional banks, though specific current rates beyond solar loans (6.99% APR) are not detailed on the website. The institution serves a defined geographic membership area, which may limit accessibility for those outside their service counties. Member reviews highlight strong customer service and personalized attention. However, as a smaller regional credit union, they may have fewer branches and less extensive digital innovation compared to larger national institutions.
pros: Specialized eco-friendly loan products (solar loans at 6.99% APR, general eco-loans) aligned with sustainability goals
Extended drive-thru hours (7:30am-5:30pm weekdays) for working members
Full-service banking including checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, credit cards, and multiple loan types under one institution
Member-owned credit union structure typically offering competitive rates and dividend potential
Active community engagement with events, charitable giving, and seasonal member promotions
Free financial counseling and fraud/identity theft support included for members
Strong member satisfaction based on reviews citing excellent customer service and helpful staff
cons: Geographic membership restrictions (requires residence, employment, or education in 5 Wisconsin counties or family connection) limit accessibility
Limited branch network (only 2 locations in Neenah and Appleton) compared to regional or national banks
Current interest rates for most products not prominently displayed on website beyond solar loan rate
No mention of mobile app features or digital banking capabilities beyond basic online/mobile banking existence
Smaller institution may have fewer ATM partnerships or less developed commercial lending capabilities
best_for: Wisconsin residents in Winnebago, Outagamie, Calumet, Waupaca, or Waushara counties seeking comprehensive local banking
Environmentally conscious borrowers interested in financing solar installations or other eco-friendly projects
Members preferring credit union membership with community involvement and personalized service over large bank chains
Families with established relationships in the service area seeking member-owned institution with Earth-Kind values
diagnosis: Evergreen Credit Union is best for Wisconsin residents within its defined service counties who value local, member-owned banking with a sustainability focus and personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic membership restriction—only those living, working, or studying in the five-county service area or with family members in that area qualify, making it inaccessible to most consumers outside Wisconsin's Fox Valley region.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Evergreen — Credit Union in NEENAH, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Evergreen — NCUA-insured credit union in NEENAH, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
